content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma +2.74%, Auto +0.96%, Bank Nifty +0.85% and VIX cooling -2.7% to 17.43. Defence, capital goods and specialty chemicals showing strong post-earnings momentum. Book is well-positioned with 11 holdings — focus is on trailing SLs to lock gains and selective addition only where conviction is high.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23990,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.4%, well above breakeven. Trail SL from 1032 to 1035 (just below S1 pivot 1035.43, ~1.1% below CMP 1048.90 — respects 1% trail-gap rule). Locks in +5.2% on the position; thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA<1%, NIM expansion, RBI rate cycle tailwind) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.9%, gold recovering (+1.30% today). SL 119 already 4% below CMP, defensive hedge. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.5%, made new ATH zone (52w high 1748.60 hit today). Trail SL from 1715 to 1720 (~1.3% below CMP 1742, respects trail-gap floor). Locks +1.2%. Q4 rev +26%, JPM Overweight, +15% YoY April cargo — bullish thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.0%, defence theme strong. Move SL to breakeven 4575 (0.97% below CMP 4619.80 — at the edge of trail-gap floor but acceptable given today's wide range and 1% buffer respected at 4575/4619.80). Eliminates downside risk. May 14 board meeting is binary — I will reduce/exit before that date if not at full target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6970.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.4%, near ATH 7200. Trail SL from 6960 to 6970 (~1.0% below CMP 7041.50, respects trail-gap floor). Locks +1.0%. Q4 PAT +124%, FY26 PAT +130%, peer SRF read-through positive. Thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.5%, gap-up day on basket move. SL at 838 = entry/breakeven. Q4 board meeting pending May — binary risk. Holding at breakeven SL caps downside; not raising further as 1% trail floor would push SL above 838 only if I trail to ~841 which is arbitrary against today's 830.55 low. Leave as is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.6%, recovering today (+6%). Q4 PAT +30%, lending book crossed Rs 2L cr, MOSL TP 325 raised. SL 362 (1.3% below CMP 366.70) appropriate; no change yet, give thesis room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.2%, near breakeven. SL 818 only 0.4% below CMP 822 — already very tight (post-results stock fell 2.33% prior session, today recovered). Leave as is; not raising into trail-gap violation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%, big +10.85% bounce after dividend deferral selloff. SL 1265 only 0.8% below CMP 1276.50 — already tight. Q1FY27 guidance flat is overhang; current SL captures most downside, no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1%, near breakeven on +9.34% sector basket day. SL 2980 = 1.6% below CMP 3037.70, within trail-gap. No-op MODIFY to add to it; leave."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 794.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.5% but recovered massively today (+9.84%) on Q4 record results (46.5% EBITDA margin, +25% non-MF growth). Tighten SL from 790 to 794 (~1.1% below CMP 802.75, respects trail-gap). Reduces drawdown risk while keeping room for the thesis."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "Lock in +5.2% on +6.4% winner."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, gold rallying."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1720.00, "reasoning": "ATH zone, lock gains."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 4575.00, "reasoning": "Move to breakeven; May 14 binary risk."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 6970.00, "reasoning": "Near ATH, lock breakeven+."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry already; Q4 binary pending."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Recovering; SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already tight at 0.4%."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already tight; weak Q1 guidance overhang."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within trail-gap; basket-move day, give it room."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 794.00, "reasoning": "Strong post-Q4 recovery; tighten SL."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA (+7.25% near 52w high, but Zentiva $5B debt deal overhang + Q4 May 30 binary) — pass on entry. SRF post-Q4 strong but SMA50 above CMP and packaging capex deferred — wait. BIOCON board meeting May 7 (1 session away) — binary, no entry per rule 11. LAURUSLABS at ATH post-results — chase risk too high after +6%. GRSE-vs-HAL: already have HAL defence exposure, GRSE adds cluster risk; skip. HFCL pending order at 133.50 from earlier — review: stock has likely run; CANCEL the pending order as it's been open 9+ hours and will not fill at 133.50 if stock moved.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 54%, well below 80% soft target. Book has 11 names — already at high diversification, adding more would dilute focus. Today's priority is RISK MANAGEMENT: trailed SLs on 5 winners (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, HAL, NAVINFLUOR, CAMS) — locks in ~+₹5,000 of unrealized gains. No new entries warranted: pharma names have binary catalysts (BIOCON May 7, AUROPHARMA May 30), capital goods cluster already represented (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = 3 names = at cluster soft cap). 5-day P&L is -₹608 with 14% win rate — discipline focus is preserving today's +₹8,297 unrealized rather than chasing breakouts. Cancel stale HFCL pending order separately."
}
